title: ACT content block — code
description: Per PRD-102-R3. A code snippet. Conformance: Standard.

language.description: Documented-open enum. Well-known values include: `bash`, `javascript`, `typescript`, `python`, `go`, `rust`, `json`, `yaml`, `html`, `css`, `sql`, `shell`, `text`. Producers SHOULD use lowercase ASCII. Adding values is MINOR per PRD-108-R4(3).

text.description: Source text of the snippet. No transformation; whitespace preserved verbatim.

filename.description: Optional. The file path or name this snippet represents.
